tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Naruto is a famous Japanese anime series that follows the journey of Naruto Uzumaki, a young ninja who dreams of becoming the Hokage.

tab2.title: Story
tab2.content: The story focuses on ninja battles, friendships, rivalries and the struggle to gain recognition and protect the village.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Naruto became one of the most successful anime series worldwide and inspired multiple movies and spin-offs.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: One Piece follows Monkey D. Luffy and his pirate crew searching for the legendary treasure called One Piece.

tab2.title: Story
tab2.content: The anime explores adventure across seas, powerful pirates, mysterious islands and legendary treasures.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: One Piece is the best-selling manga series in history.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Bleach follows Ichigo Kurosaki who gains the powers of a Soul Reaper and protects humans from evil spirits.

tab2.title: Story
tab2.content: The story explores the spiritual world, Soul Society, and battles between Soul Reapers and Hollows.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Bleach is part of the famous anime 'Big Three' alongside Naruto and One Piece.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Dragon Ball follows the adventures of Goku as he trains in martial arts and defends Earth from powerful enemies.

tab2.title: Powers
tab2.content: The series is known for powerful transformations such as Super Saiyan and intense battles.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Dragon Ball influenced many modern anime series.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Attack on Titan follows humanity's struggle against gigantic creatures known as Titans.

tab2.title: Story
tab2.content: The anime reveals deep political secrets, warfare and the mystery of Titan powers.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Attack on Titan became one of the most critically acclaimed anime of the decade.
